'''鈭歫-d-m-g''' ('''kajadmegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jumper|jumper]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-m-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jumper|jumper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-d-m-g
|-
! Lemma
| kajadmegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijadmegoko|thijadmegoko]] || [[word:jijadmegoko|jijadmegoko]] || [[word:shijadmegoko|shijadmegoko]] || [[word:kijadmegoko|kijadmegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
